reviews.comment:
Soy socio del año 1988 , (32 años)
En Ushuaia he tenido muy buena resolución ante los problemas que surgieron. Buen servicio de grúa
LO QUE NO ENTIENDO ES PORQUE  NO REPARAN EL ELEVADOR EN EL LAVADERO , ELEMENTO TAN ÚTIL EN LA ZONA PARA LA LIMPIEZA DEL CHASIS , DEBIDO A LA SAL QUE SE UTILIZA EN INVIERNO PARA LIBERAR NIEVE EN LAS CALLES

(Translated by Google)
I've been a member since 1988 (32 years). In Ushuaia, I've had excellent service when problems arose. The towing service is good.
What I don't understand is why they don't repair the lift at the car wash, such a useful tool in the area for cleaning the chassis, due to the salt used in winter to remove snow from the streets.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaVk3WkVBEAE
